title: Filling Line 1 Labeler Changeover Checklist For SKU-C500

sections.title: Line clearance
sections.content: Remove previous SKU labels, cartons, and loose product from the labeler, reject bin, and guide rail area before loading SKU-C500 materials.

sections.title: Guide and recipe setup
sections.content: Set guide rails to the C500 reference marks, load the C500 label roll, and confirm HMI recipe RCP-C500-LBL before jogging product.

sections.title: First-piece verification
sections.content: Hold restart until first-piece verification confirms label position, barcode readability, SKU match, and quality sign-off.
